simple_types.name: Msg_Kind
simple_types.code:
type Msg_Kind is
  (Kind_Nil,
   Kind_Boolean,
   Kind_Integer,
   Kind_Unsigned,
   Kind_Float_32,
   Kind_Float_64,
   Kind_String,
   Kind_Binary,
   …,
   Kind_Extension);

record_types.name: Extension

subprograms.name: Peek_Kind
subprograms.code:
function Peek_Kind
  (Data : Byte_Array; Position : Positive) return Msg_Kind
